hops.context: to autonomously manage a lottery to incentive users participation
then we built a proof-of-concept of the DSS that proves the technical feasibility of two fundamental tasks
namely the IoT monitoring activity of seed conservation conditions in domestic freezers

question: Which task does the DSS prove technically feasible, as part of its integration into the IoT monitoring activity in the context of lottery management?

options.A: Enhancing security measures for IoT devices to prevent data breaches in the network
options.B: Calculating the optimal distribution of lottery tickets based on user geographic locations
options.C: Monitoring environmental conditions in domestic freezers to ensure optimal seed conservation
options.D: Tracking user participation rates in the lottery to adjust reward mechanisms dynamically

explanation: The DSS, as part of the IoT monitoring activity, specifically proves the feasibility of monitoring seed conservation conditions in domestic freezers. This is directly linked to the context of autonomously managing a lottery to incentivize user participation, where the monitoring task is essential for the overall integrity and success of the project.
context: to autonomously manage a lottery to incentive users participation | then we built a proof-of-concept of the DSS that proves the technical feasibility of two fundamental tasks | namely the IoT monitoring activity of seed conservation conditions in domestic freezers
